rulings.Case Title: MARGARET PATRICK, et al VS. METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Chicago Bridge & Iron Company¿s motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication are continued to April 4, 2013 pursuant to plaintiffs¿ C.C.P. 437c(h) request for a continuance, which is granted. If a hearing is requested to contest this continuance, it will be at 9:45am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: MARGARET PATRICK, et al VS. METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Bragg Investment Company, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND TOWNSEND et al VS. ASSOCIATED INSULATION OF CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Dorothy Townsend As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to appoint Dorothy Townsend as successor-in-interest to, and substitute successor-in-interest for, deceased plaintiff and for leave to file second amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/TLJ)
